RUNNING / RANDONNÉE
Confidentialité avant tout
Par défaut, G-SQUAD masque le départ et l'arrivée si tu partages ton activité. Ton tracé reste privé tant que tu ne le publies pas.
Masquer départ et arrivée
Recommandé pour les activités dehors
Crée ton activité
Choisis ton activité, autorise la localisation, puis laisse G-SQUAD calculer la distance automatiquement.
Garde l'app ouverte pendant l'activité. Sur iPhone, le GPS peut se couper si l'écran est verrouillé trop longtemps.

12px}.gs-run240-panel.on{display:block}.gs-run240-card{background:rgba(18,24,33,.92);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.075);border-radius:22px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.14)}.gs-run240-step{font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;font-weight:1000;color:rgba(245,243,238,.62);margin-bottom:10px}.gs-run240-gps{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);padding:11px 12px;margin-bottom:10px}.gs-run240-gps span{display:block;min-width:0}.gs-run240-gps b{display:block;font-size:13px;color:var(--txt);font-weight:1000}.gs-run240-gps em{display:block;margin-top:2px;font-size:11px;color:var(--txt2);font-style:normal;font-weight:800;line-height:1.25}.gs-run240-gps button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:var(--txt);border-radius:999px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:1000}.gs-run240-gps.good{border-color:rgba(124,255,155,.25);background:rgba(124,255,155,.07)}.gs-run240-gps.good b{color:#DFFFE6}.gs-run240-gps.mid{border-color:rgba(255,213,122,.24);background:rgba(255,213,122,.07)}.gs-run240-gps.mid b{color:#FFE2A3}.gs-run240-gps.bad,.gs-run240-gps.none{border-color:rgba(255,107,122,.26);background:rgba(255,107,122,.08)}.gs-run240-gps.bad b,.gs-run240-gps.none b{color:#FFC2C9}.gs-run240-tabs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px}.gs-run240-tabs button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);color:var(--txt2);border-radius:999px;height:36px;font-size:11px;font-weight:1000}.gs-run240-tabs button.active{background:rgba(143,185,255,.16);border-color:rgba(143,185,255,.36);color:#EAF2FF}.gs-run240-goal-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}.gs-run240-goal-row input{height:44px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);color:var(--txt);font-size:15px;font-weight:1000;padding:0 13px;outline:none}.gs-run240-goal-row button{height:44px;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:var(--txt);color:#071018;font-size:13px;font-weight:1000;padding:0 14px}.gs-run240-trip{margin-bottom:10px!important}.gs-run240-trip button{height:38px!important}.gs-run240-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(124,255,155,.10);border:1px solid rgba(124,255,155,.26);color:#DFFFE6;padding:7px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:1000;margin:0 0 10px}.gs-run240-badge.off{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:var(--txt2)}.gs-run240-derived{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:7px;margin-top:2px}.gs-run240-derived div{background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.055);border-radius:15px;padding:9px 6px;text-align:center}.gs-run240-derived b{display:block;font-size:14px;line-height:1.05;color:var(--txt);font-weight:1000}.gs-run240-derived span{display:block;font-size:9px;color:var(--txt2);font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-top:4px}.gs-run240-derived.muted{display:block;color:var(--txt2);font-size:12px;font-weight:800;line-height:1.35;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:16px;padding:12px}.gs-run240-note{margin-top:8px;color:rgba(245,243,238,.64);font-size:11px;line-height:1.35;font-weight:800}.gs-run240-actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:7px}.gs-run240-actions button{min-height:42px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:var(--txt);font-size:12px;font-weight:1000;padding:9px}.gs-run240-actions button:first-child{background:rgba(143,185,255,.15);border-color:rgba(143,185,255,.32);color:#EAF2FF}.gs-run240-actions button.ghost{background:rgba(124,255,155,.10);border-color:rgba(124,255,155,.26);color:#DFFFE6}.gs-run240-results{display:grid;gap:7px;margin-top:10px}.gs-run240-empty{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-radius:17px;padding:12px 13px;color:var(--txt2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.35;font-weight:800}.gs-run240-empty.warn{border-color:rgba(255,197,94,.26);background:rgba(255,197,94,.08);color:#F4D59B}.gs-run240-empty.good{border-color:rgba(124,255,155,.26);background:rgba(124,255,155,.08);color:#DFFFE6}.gs-run240-count{font-size:11px;color:var(--txt2);font-weight:900;margin:0 0 2px 2px;line-height:1.35}.gs-run240-result{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:10px;align-items:center;width:100%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(7,10,14,.36);border-radius:18px;padding:12px;text-align:left;color:var(--txt)}.gs-run240-result span{min-width:0}.gs-run240-result b{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:1000;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.gs-run240-result em{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:var(--txt2);font-size:11px;font-style:normal;font-weight:800;line-height:1.25}.gs-run240-result small{display:inline-flex;margin-top:6px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(143,185,255,.10);border:1px solid rgba(143,185,255,.20);color:#DDEBFF;padding:4px 7px;font-size:10px;font-weight:1000}.gs-run240-result strong{font-size:11px;line-height:1.25;text-align:right;color:#EAF2FF;white-space:nowrap}.gs-run240-result strong i{font-style:normal;color:var(--txt2);font-weight:800}.gs-run240-favs{display:grid;gap:7px}.gs-run240-fav-empty{color:var(--txt2);font-size:12px;font-weight:800}.gs-run240-fav-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:7px;align-items:center}.gs-run240-fav-row button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);border-radius:16px;color:var(--txt);padding:10px span{display:block;margin-top:2px;color:var(--txt2);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.gs-run240-fav-row .del{color:#FFC2C9;text-align:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:1000;padding:10px}.gs-run240-ready .ready{color:#DFFFE6!important;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:10px!important;margin-bottom:4px!important}.gs-run240-ready .save{min-width:0!important}.gs-run236-mapbox.full .gs-run237-map-stats{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr))!important;gap:6px!important;z-index:16025!important}.gs-run236-mapbox.full .gs-run237-map-stats w.document.open();w.document.write(html);w.document.close();setTimeout(function(){try{w.focus();w.print()}catch(e){}},350) }; function ensureJournalPdfButton(){var cal=document.querySelector('#p-journal .gs-jr-cal');if(!cal||document.getElementById('gs-journal-pdf-final'))return;var head=cal.querySelector('.gs-jr-cal-head');if(!head){head=document.createElement('div');head.className='gs-jr-cal-head';var titleWrap=document.createElement('div');['.gs-jr-label','.gs-jr-title'].forEach(function(sel){var n=cal.querySelector(sel);if(n)titleWrap.appendChild(n)});head.appendChild(titleWrap);cal.insertBefore(head,cal.firstChild)}var btn=document.createElement('button');btn.id='gs-journal-pdf-final';btn.className='gs-journal-pdf-btn';btn.type='button';btn.textContent='PDF';btn.onclick=function(){exportJournalPDF()};head.appendChild(btn)} function emojiGrid(sel){sel=sel||'⚡';return '
'+E(sel)+'
'+window.SQUAD_EMOJIS.map(function(e){return ''}).join('')+'
'} window._gsSquadEmoji=window._gsSquadEmoji||'⚡';window.gsPickSquadEmoji=function(e,btn){window._gsSquadEmoji=e;var pr=document.getElementById('gs-squad-emoji-preview');if(pr)pr.textContent=e;document.querySelectorAll('.gs-squad-emoji-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('sel')});if(btn)btn.classList.add('sel')}; window.gsCreatePrivateSquad=function(){var old=document.getElementById('gs-sq-modal');if(old)old.remove();var friends=getFriends();var picker=friends.length?friends.map(function(f){var id=memberId(f),av=f.avatar?'':E((memberName(f)||'?').charAt(0).toUpperCase());return '
'+av+'
'+E(memberName(f))+'
'}).join(''):'
👋Tu n’as pas encore d’amis.
';var html='
Nouvelle squad

Créer une squad privée

Emoji de squad
'+emojiGrid(window._gsSquadEmoji)+'
Nom du groupe
Ajouter des amis
'+picker+'
';document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',html)}; window.gsConfirmCreateSquadFinal=async function(){var nameEl=document.getElementById('gs-sq-name-input'),raw=(nameEl&&nameEl.value||'').trim();if(!raw){toast('Donne un nom à ta squad');return}var base=raw.replace(/[-_]?SQUAD$/i,'').trim()||raw,name=base.toUpperCase()+'-SQUAD',selected=[];document.querySelectorAll('#gs-sq-friends-list .gs-sq-friend-row').forEach(function(row){var btn=row.querySelector('.gs-sq-friend-toggle');if(btn&&btn.classList.contains('sel'))selected.push(row.getAttribute('data-fid'))});var sq={id:'sq_'+Date.now()+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,5),name:name,members:selected,createdAt:Date.now(),ownerId:uid(),squadEmoji:window._gsSquadEmoji,squad_emoji:window._gsSquadEmoji,squadXP:0,squadXPLog:[],bossIdx:0};getSquads().push(sq);spawnNextBoss(sq);save();try{if(window._supa&&uid())await window._supa.from('private_squads').insert({id:sq.id,name:sq.name,squad_emoji:sq.squadEmoji,boss:sq.boss,boss_idx:sq.bossIdx,squad_xp:0,squad_xp_log:[]})}catch(e){}toast('Squad "'+name+'" créée');if(window.gsOpenPrivateSquads)window.gsOpenPrivateSquads()}; window.buildRouteSVG=function(points,width,height){if(!points||points.length<2)return '
Pas assez de points GPS
';var lats=points.map(function(p){return parseFloat(p.lat)}),lngs=points.map(function(p){return parseFloat(p.lng)}),minLat=Math.min.apply(null,lats),maxLat=Math.max.apply(null,lats),minLng=Math.min.apply(null,lngs),maxLng=Math.max.apply(null,lngs),pad=10,W=width||280,H=height||140;function toX(lng){return maxLng===minLng?W/2:pad+(lng-minLng)/(maxLng-minLng)*(W-pad*2)}function toY(lat){return maxLat===minLat?H/2:pad+(maxLat-lat)/(maxLat-minLat)*(H-pad*2)}var pts=points.map(function(p){return toX(parseFloat(p.lng)).toFixed(1)+','+toY(parseFloat(p.lat)).toFixed(1)}).join(' ');var sx=toX(parseFloat(points[0].lng)),sy=toY(parseFloat(points[0].lat)),ex=toX(parseFloat(points[points.length-1].lng)),ey=toY(parseFloat(points[points.length-1].lat));return ''}; setInterval(function(){ensureThemeInSettings();ensureJournalPdfButton();var sq=getActiveSquad();if(sq&&sq.bossStarted&&document.getElementById('boss-wrap')){try{renderBossUI(sq)}catch(e){}}},5000); })();
